summary: A studio video, posted by the Labor Department official, of a man in a gray suit and light blue tie addressing the camera directly. He stands at a podium-style setup in front of a blue backdrop bearing a U.S. Department of Labor seal, flanked by an American flag and a departmental flag. Burned-in white captions track his spoken remarks about the Bureau of International Labor Affairs and four new self-assessment tools for businesses. The audio is spoken word.

script.scene: A man in a gray suit and blue tie speaks to camera in front of a blue U.S. Department of Labor backdrop with a US flag and a departmental flag. Caption: 'of International Labor'.
Same framing as he continues. Caption: 'ensure American businesses'.

notable_text: of International Labor; ensure American businesses; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF LABOR
